title: Sun and Moon Circular
description: Add a special touch to your Minecraft sky with the Sun and Moon Circular texture pack, which transforms the sun and moon phases into rounded, smoother shapes, offering a unique and elegant look to the game’s horizon.
body:
Add a special touch to your Minecraft sky with the Sun and Moon Circular texture pack, which transforms the sun and moon phases into rounded, smoother shapes, offering a unique and elegant look to the game’s horizon.  

  The Sun and Moon Circular texture pack brings a fresh perspective to the Minecraft sky. With this pack, the sun and all moon phases are redesigned into rounded and harmonious shapes, replacing the default square models. This subtle change enhances the game's immersion and gives the environment a more beautiful and natural appearance.  

If you’re looking for a simple yet impactful way to refresh the sky's aesthetics in Minecraft, this texture pack is perfect for you!  

Features:
- Circular-shaped sun.  
- Rounded moon phases.  
- Compatible with various Minecraft versions.  

Download now and transform your game's sky with Sun and Moon Circular! 🌞🌙
